short_summary: Iran war economic warning, consulate attack
rationale: The World Bank's formal warning of a post-COVID global economic low due to the US-Iran war directly affects American markets and living costs; the attack on the US consulate in Toronto is a direct security incident involving US interests.

top_events.title: World Bank: US-Iran war to pull global economy to post-COVID low
top_events.summary: Direct warning that the ongoing US-Iran conflict could cause the worst global economic downturn since COVID, threatening US financial markets, inflation, and jobs.

top_events.title: Toronto police officer shot while investigating attack on US consulate
top_events.summary: An attack on a US consulate in Canada and a police officer shot in response; direct threat to US diplomatic personnel and US-Canada security cooperation.

top_events.title: Xi Jinping visits Pyongyang to revitalise China-North Korea ties
top_events.summary: Deepening China-DPRK alignment challenges US Indo-Pacific strategy and could complicate North Korea denuclearization diplomacy.
